brief: Generate and apply a What If Invest app icon, update the launch screen to use the same brand mark, port Hi_Tomorrow-style App Store Connect automation for first-review readiness, archive the app, then fill ASC env values where discoverable after archive/setup.
notes: Live session clarified that the icon direction may be selected by the agent.
User approved a blue and white fintech icon with a hindsight-to-value investing motif.
User requested Hi_Tomorrow-style deployment automation and an archive/readiness attempt.
First review means App Store Connect ids may not exist yet; env should be scaffolded and filled when discoverable.
